Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Production Of Rfp Demand No.1 Set 1 And For Monetary Sanction Against Hightower Production Llc And Irs Attorney Christina A Diedoardo Of The Law Offices Of Christina Diedoardo
Off Calendar Jul-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on FRI-JUL-26-2013:
Joseph E. Schoenholtz, Esq. [650.714.6243] appearing for MR. MATT BLACK, plaintiff / moving party; No appearance by or on behalf of the defendant.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Plaintiff MATT BLACK'S Motion for Order Compelling Production of RFP Demand No.1 Set 1 and for Monetary Sanction Against Hightower Production LLC And IRS Attorney Christina A Diedoardo of The Law Offices of Christina Diedoardo: GRANT IN PART AND DENY IN PART. THE MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AS SET FORTH IN DEMAND NO. 1 OF SET NO. 1 IS GRANTED (EXCEPT THAT TAX RETURNS NEED NOT BE PRODUCED). SANCTIONS OF $3,290 ARE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANT ONLY. THE MOTION IS DENIED TO THE EXTENT THAT IT SEEKS SANCTIONS OR ANY OTHER RELIEF AGAINST DEFENDANT'S FORMER COUNSEL CHRISTINA A. DIEDOARDO. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED AND SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: joseph schoenholtz, esq., 650.714.6243, for plaintiff matt black.
christina diedoardo, esq., 415.839.5098, for defendant hightower production llc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF MATT BLACK'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT is granted. Plaintiff sufficiently demonstrates ignorance and entitlement to relief per CCP 474. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATT BLACK'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Joseph E. Schoenholtz, Jr. (650.714.6243) for plaintiff and moving party; Christina A. DiEdoardo of the Law Offices of Christina DiEdoardo (415.839.5098) for defendant and responding party

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted under C.C.P. 473. Plaintiff has leave to file an amended complaint adding Does 1-10. However, the amended complaint as to Does 1-10 does not relate back to the original filing. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: joseph schoenholtz, esq., 650.714.6243, for defendant matt black.
christina diedoardo, esq., 415.839.5098, for defendant hightower production llc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT HIGHTOWER PRODUCTION LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. The complaint is sufficiently pled. The request for judicial notice is denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
